response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong web, distributed-systems, and DLang/Node.js/TypeScript background, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and the resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments plus a bachelor thesis. There is no cloud compute platform experience, no production cloud architecture, and no formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers. The core qualifications for this specific role are not met.
strengths: Broad senior engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Exposure to high-throughput distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching through workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Far short of the required 8 years of C++ (only ~6 months of professional C/C++)
No cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture experience
No formal technical-leadership role for cloud/DevOps engineers as preferred
